svg:
(a) MULTI-FIDELITY SEARCH PIPELINE
1 Zero-cost Scoring
NTK ████▌ SNIP ███░░ Synflow ██░ N candidates proxy eval only no training needed
2 Select Top-k
N → top-k by proxy score
3 Bilevel DARTS
w* ∂L_tr/∂w
∂L_val/∂α short search / cand. temp. annealing
4 Derivation
Σ αᵢ·opᵢ
argmax
op★ discrete
★ best candidate by val. loss
5 Full Final Training
loss
SWA
train
val AdamW · OneCycle · AMP epoch early stopping · best model by SWA val. loss
(b) DARTS CELL — MIXED-OPERATION DAG
SEARCH (continuous)
Identity TimeConv Fourier GRN ··· softmax(α/τ)
τ cool warm anneal
c k−1
h 1
h 2
c k
o̅(x) = Σᵢ softmax(αᵢ/τ) · opᵢ(x)
DERIVED (discrete)
argmax α
op★
op★
op★
op★
c k−1
h 1
h 2
c k
op★ = opᵢ where i = argmax α
Candidate operations — DEFAULT_OPS (14 cell ops; Mamba is a topology mode, not a cell op)
Identity TimeConv GRN Wavelet Fourier TCN ResidualMLP
ConvMixer MultiScaleConv PyramidConv PatchEmbed InvertedAttn
NBeats TimesNet
Encoder α: {LSTM, GRU, Transformer, PatchTST} · Decoder α: {LSTM, GRU, Transformer} AttentionBridge α: {none, sdp, linear, probsparse, cosine, local} (6 modes, searched jointly)
